race.comment: Good little race. EXIT (1) won well on heavy ground at Flemington two back before an excusable run last time in Listed company in Adelaide. She'll get some sting out here and draws for every chance to bounce back to form. Wary of BELLA VERONA (6) who was backed into $1.75 on debut at Cranbourne and won with a bit of arrogance, looping the field from last to win by a length. Quickly up in grade but she looks a good one. Speaking of good ones, TWO TO TANGO (7) bumped into one last start in the form of Concord Connie who demolished her rivals by six lengths. TWO TO TANGO finished second there which may end up looking like top form. BRASS IN POCKET (8) debuted behind Concord Connie at Pakenham when running on well before an easy maiden win at Sale latest, ridden positively there. She can go on with it. CHERISH ME (3) got home quite well fresh in a good race and can improve.
